items.desc: Mr. Dhanunjay enquired, how the vendors performance has been rated at all the sites managed by EPMS
items.rem: Scorecard implemented at SLN Terminus and will be replicated at all sites.

items.topic: Man power revision in the Budget
items.desc: Mr. Dhanunjay asked to freeze the existing Manpower deployment at ONE WEST.
items.rem: This will be updated in the coming year budget for all the sites.

items.desc: Discussion on over usage of Elevators and critical equipment pertaining to ADP operations.
items.rem: Provision of sinking fund insisted for ONE WEST budget.

items.desc: EPMS requested a Shed over outdoor transformers to avoid weather failures.
items.rem: Submit critical works along with impact for further approvals.

items.desc: Gaps to be sealed in floor-to-floor shafts to avoid Pest movement.
Provision for Water discharge from STP / WTP and rain water.
items.rem: Co-ordinate regarding approvals from Govt. Authorities.

items.desc: Discussion on entry of Oil and Grease into STP; requested trap installation (INR 7 Lakhs).
items.rem: Approved for installation. Collect from tenants via notice.

items.desc: Provision for Water discharge generated from STP / WTP.
items.rem: Co-ordinate regarding approvals from Govt. Authorities.

items.desc: Drive way flooring damaged in the basements. ADP insisting on rectification.
items.rem: Submit critical works list for approval.

items.desc: Temperature rise in drives affecting elevator movement. Problematic in summer.
Vendor is out of reach and non-responsive; few works still pending.

items.rem: Standalone system; invertor part of package.

items.desc: Prepare costing on the list of works submitted.
